_note: Support — v0.27.1: SHA-256 hex digests of valid Ko-fi supporter codes. Each digest = SHA256(UTF-8 of the raw code, trimmed + lowercased). Add new codes via the dashboard's Support → Maintainer helper card (Settings tab, ?admin=1 URL param). LO ships raw codes to donors via Ko-fi email / Discord DM. NEVER remove entries — old codes stay valid forever.
